MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-16-2023 IN 206, PLAINTIFF JOY LOK'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND ALL PRE-TRIAL DATES WAS HEARD. APPEARANCES VIA COURTCALL BY JAMES O'BRIEN FOR PLAINTIFF JOY LOK; DAVIS REILLY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT RICK LEE. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 05/22/23 IS CONTINUED TO 08/28/23 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED EXCEPT FOR EXPERT DISCOVERY PER STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
